map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Don't think about the lore implications of this area, okay?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I know your IP address, I bet it's 192.168.1.1!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This isn't even my final form!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Help, I can't stop winning battles!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Sometimes I like to stand in the middle of empty rooms and contemplate life.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Help, I can't stop winning battles!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: If not supposed to eat battery, why battery taste good?
